grammar_points.title: 一点儿 + 都/也 + 不/没 — Not even a little bit
grammar_points.explanation:
This pattern expresses complete negation — not even the smallest amount. There are two main structures based on tense:

1. 一点儿 + 都/也 + 不 + adjective/verb (present/habitual negation)
• 今天一点儿都不冷。(It is not cold at all today.)
• 我一点儿也不累。(I am not tired at all.)

2. 一点儿 + 都/也 + 没 + verb (past/completed action negation)
• 她一点儿都没变。(She has not changed at all.)
• 我一点儿也没吃。(I did not eat anything at all.)

Note: 都 and 也 are interchangeable here. 一点儿 adds emotional emphasis compared to just 不/没.

examples.chinese: 今天一点儿都不冷，穿一件衣服就可以了。
examples.pinyin: jīn tiān yì diǎn ér dōu bù lěng chuān yī jiàn yī fú jiù kě yǐ le
examples.english: It is not cold at all today; one piece of clothing is enough.

examples.chinese: 他一点儿也没变，还是那么年轻。
examples.pinyin: tā yì diǎn ér yě méi biàn hái shì nà me nián qīng
examples.english: He has not changed at all; still so young.

examples.chinese: 我一点儿都不喜欢这种食物。
examples.pinyin: wǒ yì diǎn ér dōu bù xǐ huān zhè zhǒng shí wù
examples.english: I do not like this kind of food at all.

grammar_points.title: 从来 — Never / Always (emphasizing habitual negation or affirmation)
grammar_points.explanation: 从来 is an adverb meaning 'always' or 'never' in the context of habitual behavior. It is almost always used with negation: 从来不 (never) or 从来没有 (have never). Occasionally it can appear with affirmative verbs in set phrases. Structure: Subject + 从来 + 不/没有 + Verb. Example: 他从来不撒谎。(He never lies.) Note: 从来 emphasizes that something has never happened at any time in the past.

examples.chinese: 他从来不背叛朋友，是一个诚实的人。
examples.pinyin: Tā cóng lái bú bèi pàn péng yǒu, shì yí gè chéng shí de rén.
examples.english: He never betrays his friends; he is an honest person.

examples.chinese: 她从来没有忘记过我们共同的友谊。
examples.pinyin: Tā cóng lái méi yǒu wàng jì guò wǒ men gòng tóng de yǒu yì.
examples.english: She has never forgotten our shared friendship.

Tā bù wù huì cóng lái péng yǒu.

grammar_points.title: 互相 — Each other / Mutually
grammar_points.explanation: 互相 is an adverb meaning 'mutually' or 'each other'. It is placed before a verb to show that two or more people are doing something to or for one another. It cannot be used when only one person is doing an action. Structure: Subject (plural) + 互相 + Verb. Example: 他们互相帮助。(They help each other.) Note: 互相 always refers to two or more subjects performing the same action toward one another.

examples.chinese: 好朋友应该互相鼓励，共同成长。
examples.pinyin: Hǎo péng yǒu yīng gāi hù xiāng gǔ lì, gòng tóng chéng zhǎng.
examples.english: Good friends should encourage each other and grow together.

examples.chinese: 他们互相支持，友谊越来越深。
examples.pinyin: Tā men hù xiāng zhī chí, yǒu yì yuè lái yuè shēn.
examples.english: They support each other, and their friendship grows deeper and deeper.

culture_notes.title: Friendship Proverb — 在外靠朋友
culture_notes.content: A well-known Chinese saying goes: 在家靠父母，出门靠朋友 (At home you rely on your parents; outside you rely on your friends). This proverb reflects the central role that social connections play in Chinese culture. While Western culture often emphasizes individual independence, Chinese culture places great value on building and maintaining a network of trusted relationships (关系, guānxi). Friends are expected to help each other in practical ways — not just emotionally. The act of asking for help is seen as an expression of trust, and refusing to help can damage a relationship. Maintaining friendships over time through regular contact and mutual support is considered a virtue.

quiz.question: What does 联系 mean?

quiz.question: What is the difference between 道歉 and 抱歉?

They mean exactly the same thing
道歉 means friendship; 抱歉 means honesty
道歉 is a noun; 抱歉 is a verb only

互相支持需要友谊和诚实。
友谊互相支持需要真正诚实。
诚实友谊需要支持互相。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 爱玲，我知道上次的事情让你误会了，我真的很抱歉。
lines.pinyin: Ài Líng, wǒ zhī dào shàng cì de shì qíng ràng nǐ wù huì le, wǒ zhēn de hěn bào qiàn.
lines.english: Eileen, I know what happened last time caused a misunderstanding. I am truly sorry.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我也有点抱歉，我应该先听你解释，而不是生气。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yě yǒu diǎn bào qiàn, wǒ yīng gāi xiān tīng nǐ jiě shì, ér bú shì shēng qì.
lines.english: I also feel a bit sorry. I should have listened to your explanation first, instead of getting angry.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 真正的朋友应该互相支持，我从来不想伤害你。
lines.pinyin: Zhēn zhèng de péng yǒu yīng gāi hù xiāng zhī chí, wǒ cóng lái bù xiǎng shāng hài nǐ.
lines.english: True friends should support each other. I never want to hurt you.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我知道。你是一个非常诚实的人，我应该信任你。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zhī dào. Nǐ shì yí gè fēi cháng chéng shí de rén, wǒ yīng gāi xìn rèn nǐ.
lines.english: I know. You are a very honest person; I should trust you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我们和好吧，友谊比什么都重要。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ men hé hǎo ba, yǒu yì bǐ shén me dōu zhòng yào.
lines.english: Let's make up. Friendship is more important than anything.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好，不管发生什么，我们都要保持联系，也要共同进步
lines.pinyin: Hǎo,  bù guǎn fā shēng shén me，wǒ men dōu bǎo chí lián xì,yě yào gòng tóng jìn bù.
lines.english: Okay. no matter what happens, we will keep in touch and also make progress together.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我也会给你更多的信心和鼓励，朋友就是要互相帮助。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yě huì gěi nǐ gèng duō de xìn xīn hé gǔ lì, péng yǒu jiù shì yào hù xiāng bāng zhù.
lines.english: I will also give you more confidence and encouragement. That's what friends are for — to help each other.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 爱玲！好久不见，我们已经五年没联系了！
lines.pinyin: Ài Líng! Hǎo jiǔ bú jiàn, wǒ men yǐ jīng wǔ nián méi lián xì le!
lines.english: Eileen! Long time no see. We haven't been in touch for five years!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是啊！但是我从来没有忘记我们的友谊。
lines.pinyin: Shì a! Dàn shì wǒ cóng lái méi yǒu wàng jì wǒ men de yǒu yì.
lines.english: That's right! But I have never forgotten our friendship.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我也是。真正的友谊不会因为时间而消失。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yě shì. Zhēn zhèng de yǒu yì bú huì yīn wèi shí jiān ér xiāo shī.
lines.english: Me too. True friendship doesn't disappear with time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 你还是那么友好，一点都没变。我很高兴我们重新联系了。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ hái shì nà me yǒu hǎo, yì diǎn dōu méi biàn. Wǒ hěn gāo xìng wǒ men chóng xīn lián xì le.
lines.english: You are still just as friendly. You haven't changed at all. I'm glad we reconnected.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 以后我们要保持联系，我很怀念以前，每次都有说不完的话的时光。
lines.pinyin: Yǐ hòu wǒ men yào bǎo chí lián xì, wǒ hěn huái niàn yǐ qián ， měi cì dōu yǒu shuō bù wán de huà de shí guāng
lines.english: From now on we should keep contact,I miss the old days that we always had so many stories to tell!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 当然！有一段真正的友谊，是多么不容易！
lines.pinyin: Dāng rán! Yǒu yí duàn zhēn zhèng de yǒu yì ， shì duō me bù róng yì.
lines.english: Of course! It is very precious to have a genuine friendship.
